title: Document Laravel Debug Tools and Branching Process
description:
Document the standard process for using Laravel debug tools during front-end development. The documentation covers the debug branching approach to prevent debugging code and configuration from accidentally being deployed to production.

The documentation was written in Confluence to serve as a reference for all Laravel developers on the team.
acceptance_criteria: Confluence page documents the Laravel debug tool setup and usage process
Branching strategy for debug mode is clearly described
Process prevents debug code from reaching production deployments
Documentation is accessible and editable by the development team
implementation_notes: Documentation created in Confluence at: https://goodmangroup.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/MB/pages/152764417/LaravelDebug. Standardizes the debug process to prevent debug configurations from leaking into production.
comment_summary: Ryan asked Balaji to document the debug process in Confluence to standardize it across the team after issues with debug code reaching production. Balaji completed the documentation.
